title: we are NOT PREPARED for the end of 2026
summary: Wes Roth discusses developments in AI toward end of 2026, covering Google's world models and agentic capabilities, OpenAI's advances in mathematical reasoning, and anticipated AI company IPOs. The commentary suggests rapid AI progress will outpace organizational and societal preparedness.
